ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
and ( ISBLANK( Decision_Process__c ), Probability >= 0.6, ISCHANGED( StageName ), RecordType18ID__c ='012b0000000M3zQAAS', or( ISPICKVAL(Type, 'New Sale'),ISPICKVAL(Type, 'Upsell')),
NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name, 'Integration')) , $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps', $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Wolves', RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Partnership', RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Rank_Ranger', RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Acquired_Company', MEDPIC_Next_Stage__c = false )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please populate the Decision Process field
